text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet reacts with alarm to the news that
Vodka will be going abroad to train.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Left behind in Japan, Daiwa Scarlet reflects on
her time with her now-absent rival...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And renews her commitment to becoming number
one.
